summary: Debutants under a new manager — likely a direct 3-4-3 with inside 10s and high wing-backs, defending in a block to avoid space behind.
style: 3-4-3 (suspected under the new manager) — inside 10s & high wing-backs, crosses into the box, direct play; defend in a block to avoid space behind.

counterReliance.note: Direct play, defends a block to deny space behind

strengths: Direct play with high wing-backs and inside 10s
Crossing supply to a proven goalscorer
Disciplined block to deny space behind

keyPlayers.name: Eldor Shomurodov
keyPlayers.note: 22 goals in Turkey, 9 international goal involvements in 16

tactics: Get the wing-backs high and the 10s inside, play direct and cross for Shomurodov, defending in a block. Khusanov is vital in defence — but he can't do it alone.
notes: Hard to analyse precisely due to the new manager.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
